title: prunus gilanica
intro: Prunus gilanica, also known as Iranian plum or Gilan plum, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against infections. The health benefits of Prunus gilanica include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant. Prunus gilanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional recipes, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses and effects.
